signals.reason: Exceptional Tier 1 local play. A 45-minute drive from Plovdiv completely eliminates transit fatigue for a 4-year-old. At a highly verified ~€104/night, this 4-star spa resort delivers premium child-friendly pool infrastructure and absolute value, perfectly sized for a 3-night low-excitement regional reset.

Tier 1 drive (~2.5h) leveraging verified €105/night pricing at a premium 5-star mountain resort in early September. The property features dedicated kids' animators and indoor/outdoor child pools. Tailored as a 3-night short break, maximizing utility before the low-excitement mountain setting loses its appeal for a toddler.

High-excitement beach destination reachable via a low-friction 3-hour Tier 1 drive and short ferry. Early September triggers a steep price drop from peak August rates to ~€135/night, while the Aegean remains perfectly warm. The beachfront bungalow setup and shallow waters offer massive safety and utility for a 4-year-old over a 5-night stay.

High-excitement Tier 2 play anchored by extremely cheap SOF-FCO flights (under €40). This specific property offers safe, bungalow-style living with large outdoor pools—crucial for a 4-year-old to decompress in a major city. At ~€85/night for a 5-night stay, the strong absolute value entirely offsets the Sofia transit friction.
